PowerShell($pid = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if \($pid\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; "Killed PID $pid" } else { "No process found on port 8080" })
